title: viola nemoralis subsp. abbreviata
intro: Viola nemoralis subsp. abbreviata, also known as the short-stemmed wood violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the violet family. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola nemoralis subsp. abbreviata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
